name: WunderGraph
pricing_notes: Open source; WunderGraph Cloud: Starter $29/mo; Growth $99/mo

auth.notes: Multiple auth providers supported (OpenID Connect, GitHub, etc.); API-key for machine access

performance.notes: API gateway with caching; REST/GraphQL/Kafka/database unified; Redis caching built-in

agent_readiness.notes: API federation layer: unify REST, GraphQL, databases, gRPC into one API with TypeScript SDK. Type-safe client generation. Live queries (realtime subscriptions). Auth built-in. Caching layer. Good for unifying disparate APIs for agents.

gotchas: Significant learning curve — different mental model from REST/GraphQL
best_when: Unifying multiple upstream APIs (REST + GraphQL + databases) behind single typed interface
Agents that need to call 5+ different APIs with consistent auth and caching
Teams wanting type-safe API client generation from unified spec
Applications needing live queries / realtime subscriptions
avoid_when: Teams needing large community and ecosystem support
summary: WunderGraph is an API federation layer that unifies REST APIs, GraphQL, databases, and gRPC into a single type-safe TypeScript API surface with auto-generated clients. Live queries for realtime data. Built-in caching, auth, and rate limiting. Best for agents that need to orchestrate calls across many heterogeneous APIs — provides a unified, cached, typed interface.
